title: Grid Efficiency Scaling Law: Extrapolate to Continental Scale
strategies: constant baseline: predict the mean training efficiency (ignores scale trend)
semilog regression: fit eta = p + q*log(x); captures the trend but the wrong shape mis-extrapolates
saturating power law: recover eta = c - a*x**(-b) by exponent grid-search + linear least squares
invalid: emit a non-expression / disallowed token
